justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent accurately understood all temporal expressions, including specific dates, days of the week, and time preferences, without needing any clarification.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered relevant alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, and successfully found a slot that matched the user's preference in the final turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent processing multiple date and time requests in single turns and avoiding redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a professional and helpful tone throughout the conversation, successfully booking the desired appointment without any friction or exposure of internal errors.
